def negative_repeated_open_same_file_in_function():
    rule_id = "repeated_open_same_file_in_function"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "The same file appears to be opened multiple times within one function."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
